cameras._comment: Fill 'correspondences' with independent landmarks (NOT the 4 calibration points). For each landmark: 'pixel' is (u,v) clicked in the CCTV frame; 'gps' is (lat,lon) read from the satellite image. Provide EITHER 'system_gps' (single method) OR both 'flat_gps' and 'curved_gps' for the ablation. To get those, feed the pixel to your PerspectiveTransformer: flat = the H_gps path, curved = pixel_to_gps with road_pts set.
